# Adobe Marketo Connector - Full Documentation

# Adobe Marketo Connector

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Adobe Marketo Connector v3.0

Anypoint Connector for Adobe Marketo (Marketo Connector) is a closed-source connector that provides
a connection between the Mule runtime engine (Mule) and Adobe Marketo REST APIs. This connector
implements all supported v1.0 Adobe Marketo API endpoints and provides Mule 4 DataWeave
functionality.

Release Notes:
[Marketo Connector Release Notes](../../release-notes/connector/marketo-connector-release-notes-mule-4)  
Exchange:
[Marketo Connector](https://www.mulesoft.com/exchange/com.mulesoft.connectors/mule-marketo-connector/)

## Before You Begin

To use this information, you must be familiar with Adobe Marketo, Mule runtime engine (Mule),
Anypoint Connectors, Anypoint Studio, Mule concepts, elements in a Mule flow, and Global Elements.

You need login credentials to test your connection to your target resource.

For software requirements and compatibility information, see the Connector Release Notes.

## POM File Information

To use this connector with Maven, use this pom.xml dependency:

```xml
<dependency>
  <groupId>com.mulesoft.connectors</groupId>
  <artifactId>mule-marketo-connector</artifactId>
  <version>x.x.x</version>
  <classifier>mule-plugin</classifier>
</dependency>
```

Replace `x.x.x` with the version that corresponds to the connector you are using.

To obtain the most up-to-date `pom.xml` file information, access the connector in
[Anypoint Exchange](https://www.mulesoft.com/exchange/) and click **Dependency Snippets**.

## Add the Connector to Your Studio Project

Anypoint Studio provides two ways to add the connector to your Studio project: from the Exchange
button in the Studio taskbar or from the Mule Palette view.

### Add the Connector Using Exchange

1.  In Studio, create a Mule project.
2.  Click the Exchange icon **(X)** in the upper-left of the Studio task bar.
3.  In Exchange, click **Login** and supply your Anypoint Platform username and password.
4.  In Exchange, search for "marketo".
5.  Select the connector and click **Add to project**.
6.  Follow the prompts to install the connector.

### Add the Connector in Studio

1.  In Studio, create a Mule project.
2.  In the Mule Palette view, click **(X) Search in Exchange**.
3.  In **Add Modules to Project**, type "marketo" in the search field.
4.  Click this connectorâs name in **Available modules**.
5.  Click **Add**.
6.  Click **Finish**.

## To Configure in Studio

1.  Drag the connector operation to the Studio Canvas.
2.  Click the green plus button to configure the connector
3.  A window appears so that you can configure the following fields:

![Studio Configuration options](_images/marketo-studio-config.png)

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Base Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>The Marketo base path to start from, for example <code>/</code> (forward slash).</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Client Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Your Marketo Client ID.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Client Secret</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Your Marketo Client Secret.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Host</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Domain where your Marketo instance is hosted.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Port of Marketo instance.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Protocol</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>The protocol to use for data transfer such as HTTPS.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Access Token Url</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>The URL used to achieve an authorization token.</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Use Case: Create a Program in Studio 7

![Studio flow with Listener, Marketo Create program operation, and two Transform Message components](_images/marketo-studio-use.png)

## Use Case: XML

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:os="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os"
xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
xmlns:marketo-rest-api="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/marketo-rest-api"
xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/marketo-rest-api
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/marketo-rest-api/current/mule-marketo-rest-api.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os/current/mule-os.xsd">
	<configuration-properties file="mule-app.properties"
	doc:name="Configuration properties"/>
	<http:listener-config name="HTTP_Listener_config"
	doc:name="HTTP Listener config">
		<http:listener-connection host="localhost" port="8081" />
	</http:listener-config>
	<marketo-rest-api:config name="Marketo_Rest_API_Config" doc:name="Marketo Rest API Config" property_basePath="/"
	property_clientId="${clientId}"
	property_clientSecret="${clientSecret}"
	property_host="${host}"
	property_accessTokenUrl="${accessTokenUrl}"
	property_port="${port}"
	property_protocol="${protocol}"/>
	<os:object-store name="Object_store" doc:name="Object store"  config-ref="ObjectStore_Config"/>
	<os:config name="ObjectStore_Config" doc:name="ObjectStore Config"  />
	<flow name="Create_Form" >
		<http:listener doc:name="HTTP"  config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/createForm" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"description": "FormDemo",
	"folder":"22498",
	"name": "MarketoDemoForm_01"
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<marketo-rest-api:create-form doc:name="Create form" config-ref="Marketo_Rest_API_Config"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Object to JSON">
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<os:store doc:name="Store form id" key="formId" objectStore="Object_store">
			<os:value ><![CDATA[#[payload.result[0].id]]]></os:value>
		</os:store>
		<set-variable
		value="#[payload.result[0].id]"
		doc:name="Set Variable"
		variableName="id"/>
		<set-variable
		value="#[payload.result[0].name]"
		doc:name="Set Variable"
		variableName="name" />
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger"
		message="Created form named: #[vars.name] with id: #[vars.id]" />
	</flow>
</mule>
```

## See Also

[Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Adobe Marketo Connector Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Adobe Marketo Connector v3.0

Release Notes:
[Adobe Marketo Connector Release Notes](../../release-notes/connector/marketo-connector-release-notes-mule-4)

## Default Configuration

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div></div></td><td><p>The connection types that can be provided to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>host</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Host for consuming API.</p></td><td><p>marketoId.mktorest.com</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>port</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Port for consuming API.</p></td><td><p>443</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>basePath</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Basepath for consuming API.</p></td><td><p>/</p></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>protocol</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Protocol for consuming API.</p></td><td><p>HTTPS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>clientId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth2 Client ID</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>clientSecret</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth2 Client Secret.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>accessTokenUrl</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Token URL for consuming API</p></td><td><p><code>https://marketoId.mktorest.com/identity/oauth/token</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before the runtime considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. The runtime actually purges the instances when it sees fit.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Operations

## Add Custom Activities

`<marketo:add-custom-activities>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Add Custom Activities Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Add Email Module

`<marketo:add-email-module>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Add Email Module Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the module</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Index</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Index of the module. Determines the order of the module in the email.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Module Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>moduleId</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Add Field To Form

`<marketo:add-field-to-form>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Add Field To Form Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Change Lead Program Status Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Program Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>programId</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

`<marketo:create-snippet>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Create Snippet Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delete Opportunity Roles Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

`<marketo:enqueue-export-activity-job>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Export Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Id of export batch job.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Get Campaigns

`<marketo:get-campaigns>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of campaign IDs to return records for.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of names to filter on</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Program Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of program names to filter on. If set, will filter to only campaigns which are children of the designated programs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workspace Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of workspace names to filter on. If set, only returns campaigns in the given workspaces.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of records to return. Maximum and default is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint is the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Is Triggerable</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Set to true to return active Campaigns which have a Campaign is Requested trigger and source is Web Service API</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

The max and default value is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint is the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Get Custom Obects Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Field to filter on. The max and default value is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint is the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Object Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>customObjectName</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Get Email Content

`<marketo:get-email-content>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Status</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Status filter for draft or approved versions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Emails

`<marketo:get-emails>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Get Emails Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Status</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Status filter for draft or approved versions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Folder</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>JSON representation of parent folder, with members 'id', and 'type' which may be 'Folder' or 'Program'</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Integer offset for paging</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Max Return</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of channels to return. Max 200, default 20</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

`<marketo:get-export-activity-file>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Export Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Id of export batch job.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Range</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>To support partial retrieval of extracted data, the HTTP header "Range" of type "bytes" may be specified. See RFC 2616 "Range Retrieval Requests" for more information. If the header is not set, the entire contents is returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Export Activity Jobs

`<marketo:get-export-activity-jobs>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Status</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma separated list of statuses to filter on.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The batch size to return. The max and default value is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint if the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

`<marketo:get-file-by-name>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the file</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Get Files

`<marketo:get-files>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Get Files Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Folder</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>JSON representation of parent folder, with members 'id', and 'type' which may be 'Folder' or 'Program'</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

`<marketo:get-folder-by-name>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the folder. Not applicable for Programs</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Type of folder. 'Folder' or 'Program'</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Root</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Parent folder reference</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Work Space</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the workspace</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

`<marketo:get-landing-page-by-name>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the landing page</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Status</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Status filter for draft or approved versions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Max Return</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of channels to return. Max 200, default 20</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Integer offset for paging</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Max Return</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of channels to return. Max 200, default 20.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Integer offset for paging</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Status</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Status filter for draft or approved versions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Folder</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>JSON representation of parent folder, with members 'id', and 'type'. which may be 'Folder' or 'Program'.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Lead Activities

`<marketo:get-lead-activities>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Token representation of a datetime returned by the Get Paging Token endpoint. This endpoint returns the activities that occur after this datetime.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Activity Type Ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of activity type IDs. These can be retrieved with the Get Activity Types API.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Asset Ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Id of the primary asset for an activity. This is based on the primary asset ID of a given activity type. Should only be used when a single activity type is set.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Id of a static list. If set, only returns activities of members of this static list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Lead Ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of lead IDs. If set, only returns activities of the leads with these IDs. Allows up to 30 entries.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of records to return. Maximum and default is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Get Lead Changes

`<marketo:get-lead-changes>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Token representation of a datetime returned by the Get Paging Token endpoint. This endpoint returns the activities that occur after this datetime.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of field names to return changes for. Field names can be retrieved with the Describe Lead API.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of a static list. If set, only returns activities of members of this static list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Lead Ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of lead IDs. If set, only returns activities of the leads with these IDs. Allows up to 30 entries.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of records to return. Maximum and default is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Leads By Filter Type

`<marketo:get-leads-by-filter-type>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The lead field to filter on.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter Values</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A comma-separated list of values to filter on in the specified fields.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A comma-separated list of lead fields to return for each record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The batch size to return. The max and default value is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint if the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Get Leads By List ID From List

`<marketo:get-leads-by-list-id-from-list>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of lead fields to return for each record. If unset, returns email, updatedAt, createdAt, lastName, firstName, and ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The batch size to return. The max and default value is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint is the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the static list to retrieve records from</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Lists

`<marketo:get-lists>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of static list IDs to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of static list names to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Program Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of program names. If set, returns all static lists that are children of the given programs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workspace Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of workspace names. If set, returns all static lists that are children of the given workspaces.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The batch size to return. The max and default value is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint is the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Program By Name

`<marketo:get-program-by-name>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the program</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

## Get Programs

`<marketo:get-programs>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Max Return</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of channels to return. Max 200, default 20.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Integer offset for paging.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional filter. Requires filterValues.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

### Parameters

Max 200, default 20.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Integer offset for paging.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Salespersons

`<marketo:get-salespersons>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The lead field to filter on.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter Values</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A comma-separated list of values to filter on in the specified fields.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The batch size to return. The max and default value is 300.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Next Page Token</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A token is returned by this endpoint is the result set is greater than the batch size and can be passed in a subsequent call through this parameter. See Paging Tokens for more info.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

`<marketo:import-leads>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Import Leads Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Format</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Import file format.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Lookup Field</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Field to use for deduplication.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Partition Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the lead partition to import to.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>List Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the static list to import into.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

Only valid for instances with are natively synchronized to SFDC.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Lead Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the lead to associate.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>application/json</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Sync Named Account Lists Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Update Email Variable Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>name</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Update Snippet Metadata Request Data</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the output of the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Types

## Expiration Policy

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Max Idle Time</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>A scalar time value for the maximum amount of time a dynamic configuration instance should be allowed to be idle before itâs considered eligible for expiration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Time Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the maxIdleTime attribute.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>
